topic: magnum format and slower bottle ageing
trigger_keywords: mas vino en relacion al oxigeno

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A magnum contains twice the wine of a standard bottle but has a closure and headspace of broadly similar scale.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Each unit of wine is exposed to a lower proportion of oxygen entering through the closure or held in the headspace.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Oxidative development is generally slower, allowing suitable wines to evolve gradually and retain freshness for longer.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Oxidative development is generally slower, allowing suitable wines to evolve gradually and retain freshness for longer.
